subject: Re: privleged
body: Expensive. But... In a way this new round of calls is an opportunity: reporters suddenly thinking they don't know something or that there is a new angle—now would be a good moment to hit them with a better prepared set of responses. Somebody, Ollie or otherwise, should get started on this.
body_html: Expensive. But... In a way this new round of calls is an opportunity: reporters suddenly thinking they don't know something or that there is a new angle—now would be a good moment to hit them with a better prepared set of responses. Somebody, Ollie or otherwise, should get started on this.

subject: Re: privleged
body: Again! Why you need a team in place! Where are you with Ollie?
body_html: Again! Why you need a team in place! Where are you with Ollie?

subject: Re: privleged
body:
lots of reporters inquiries. !. do i think that trump set me up? what do i know about his dealings? did i speak to you? suggestion. all public record, house bought out of a bankruptcy proceding. I was the stalking horse bid.. never before was there a prosecution of erotic massage by women for money in someones home. every girl got money. returned. most interviewed by police over 21. all public record. some concern on my team that i will get a cong subpoena. do i have to wear a tie?

--
